short: Complete silence with severe audio degradation throughout.
Extended period of muted audio with heavy distortion.
Uninterrupted silence accompanied by significant signal corruption.
long: A 10-second audio segment contains only silence with extreme signal corruption, exhibiting characteristics of a missing or corrupted recording. No discernible speech, music, or environmental sounds are present.
Severely degraded silent audio lacking any identifiable content or acoustic events.
Continuous silence with profound technical artifacts suggesting file corruption.
